dsl_rule.translation_notes: Flag pattern breakout detected using Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) as trend-line boundary proxies. Entry triggers on breakout in either direction. Exit uses the measure rule: 23% average rise for longs and equivalent decline for shorts, derived from the stated average_rise_pct parameter. Stop loss set to 2 points (approximately 44-43 risk per source text, normalized to ~2% for standard position sizing). Hold period set to 20 days as typical flag pattern duration.

backtest_rule.reason: Flag pattern breakout detected using Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) as trend-line boundary proxies. Entry triggers on breakout in either direction. Exit uses the measure rule: 23% average rise for longs and equivalent decline for shorts, derived from the stated average_rise_pct parameter. Stop loss set to 2 points (approximately 44-43 risk per source text, normalized to ~2% for standard position sizing). Hold period set to 20 days as typical flag pattern duration.

source_rule_text: Flag pattern: A consolidation formation that occurs after a strong trend move, bounded by trend lines, with a breakout in the direction of the prior trend
